L1_headline: + ESPR – Benjamin Looker files to sell 1,689 shares. | 01/20/26
L2_brief: Benjamin Looker, an officer at Esperion Therapeutics, filed to sell 1,689 shares of common stock valued at approximately $4,867. The sale is to cover tax obligations from recently vested restricted stock, representing routine compensation-related selling rather than a discretionary decision.

L3_detailed.broker_info: Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, 900 Salem Street, Smithfield, RI 02917
L3_detailed.deal_signal: N/A - This appears to be routine tax-related selling tied to equity compensation vesting, not indicative of any deal-related concerns. The seller also sold 6,517 shares in December 2025 under similar circumstances.
risks_flagged: Small routine sale for tax withholding purposes
Consistent with prior December 2025 sale pattern (6,517 shares for $23,897)
No material concerns indicated - filing includes standard representation that seller has no knowledge of undisclosed material adverse information
